mapper.sql: id, name, model_type, provider, model_code, encrypted_api_key, api_base_url, config_json, system_prompt, is_default, status, last_test_status, last_test_latency_ms, last_test_message, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: select from cook_ai_models where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
select from cook_ai_models where model_type = #{modelType} and is_default = 1 and status = 'enabled' and deleted_at is null order by id asc limit 1
mapper.update:
update cook_ai_models
name = #{name}, provider = #{provider}, model_code = #{modelCode}, encrypted_api_key = #{encryptedApiKey}, api_base_url = #{apiBaseUrl}, config_json = #{configJson}, system_prompt = #{systemPrompt}, is_default = #{isDefault}, status = #{status}, updated_at = current_timestamp
where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_ai_models set is_default = 0, updated_at = current_timestamp where model_type = #{modelType} and deleted_at is null
update cook_ai_models set is_default = 1, status = 'enabled', updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_ai_models set last_test_status = #{status}, last_test_latency_ms = #{latencyMs}, last_test_message = #{message}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
